title: Mediterranean Flatbread
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make flatbread topped with creamy feta and rich Mediterranean ingredients.
instructions: Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy.
While the flatbread is baking, mix together the feta cheese, hummus, olives, parsley, artichoke hearts, and red onion.
Once the flatbread is done, remove it from the oven and top with the feta mixture.
Return the flatbread to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
